units.content: system of claim 22 includes a classifier component
classifier is designed to produce a dynamical-signature annotation for each qualifying cyclic subgraph
typed cycle annotation indicates spectral-radius metric reaches predetermined threshold
dynamical-signature annotation takes one of at least four predetermined values
the four values distinguish between four distinct dynamical signatures
first signature: measurement records converge toward value predicted by prediction records
second signature: measurement records drift toward boundary values of property range
third signature: target entity is altered in response to action records
fourth signature: action-record selection is optimized against prediction records
